data-product-element="Cosy Fixed" data-product-element="Cosy Flex" data-product-element="Dynamic" data-product-element="Mega Cap" data-product-element="Off-peak Fixed" data-product-element="Off-peak Flex" data-product-element="Off-peak Impact" data-product-element="Online Fixed" data-product-element="Online Flex" data-product-element="Smart Fixed" data-product-element="Smart Flex" data-product-element="Zen Fixed"
